dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)
case_id: random patient from PID 1-200 in LibreHealth EHR

pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh shows file is created at this path with patient details
Task description explicitly states: Tobacco Use: 'Current every day smoker'
Task description states: Alcohol: 'Beer and wine, 4-5 drinks per week'. All keywords are substrings of this value.
Task description states: Recreational Drugs: 'None'. 'none' is an exact match; 'n/a' is included for flexibility.
Task description states: Exercise Patterns: 'Sedentary lifestyle, no regular exercise'. Both keywords are substrings.
Task description states: Counseling: 'N/A'. Both keywords cover the expected value.

pi_items.verified_value: NHANES data from LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr GitHub repository
Real NHANES patients (9,375 patients) used for demo/educational purposes in LibreHealth EHR
pi_items.source: Web search confirms NHANES is real National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey data from CDC. LibreHealthIO is a real open-source EHR project using NHANES for demonstration.

pi_items.verified_value: Random selection from patient_data table WHERE fname IS NOT NULL AND lname IS NOT NULL AND pid BETWEEN 1 AND 200
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh shows MySQL query with RAND() for random patient selection

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic task-specified values (not from patient database; to be entered by agent)
pi_items.source: All expected values come from task.json description field, not from patient data. Verifier.py checks that agent entered these values.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NHANES patient data (9,375 patients) from the official LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr open-source repository. A random patient is selected from the database (PID 1-200 with non-null names). The task specifies synthetic social history values for the agent to enter: Tobacco='Current every day smoker', Alcohol='Beer and wine, 4-5 drinks per week', Drugs='None', Exercise='Sedentary lifestyle, no regular exercise', Counseling='N/A'. The patient information is written to /tmp/task_patient_info.txt. The verifier checks if the agent successfully updated these fields in the database using keyword matching rather than exact value comparison.
